title: Brașov、Brașov — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Brașov、Brașovの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

BrașovはBrașovにある人口253,200の都市です。The jewel of Transylvania, set against the Carpathian Mountains, famous for its medieval Saxon old town, the nearby Bran Castle, and year-round outdoor activities.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
